title: Implement canonical class-list resolver from champion score YAML
description:
## Summary
Implement one canonical class-list resolver from champion score YAML.

## Purpose
Provide a single source of truth for class labels used by associated-dataset balancing.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Resolver extracts class list deterministically from champion score YAML.
- Fail-fast error when class list cannot be resolved.
- No alternate class-source fallback path is introduced.
- Tests cover success and fail-fast behavior.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Starting implementation of canonical champion-YAML class resolver for dataset curation. Plan: add deterministic extraction helper + fail-fast behavior + focused tests.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented canonical class-list resolver in curation layer: resolve_score_valid_classes_from_champion_yaml(client, score_id). Behavior: reads champion score version YAML, extracts classes deterministically from top-level classes[].name and graph[].valid_classes, deduplicates while preserving first-seen order, normalizes YAML bool Yes/No tokens to string class labels, and fails fast on missing champion/config/classes or invalid YAML. Added focused tests in plexus/cli/dataset/curation_test.py (deterministic extraction, missing champion, missing classes). Verification: pytest -q plexus/cli/dataset/curation_test.py tests/scores/test_score_validation.py -q => pass; py_compile for curation modules => pass.
